subject: [PATCH 08/14] sunrpc: add netlink upcall for the auth.unix.ip cache

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch adds netlink-based cache upcall support for the ip_map (auth.unix.ip) cache in the sunrpc subsystem. It introduces new attributes and operations to the sunrpc_cache YAML spec, including ip-map attribute-set and ip-map-reqs wrapper. The patch also implements two new functions: one to snapshot pending requests and send them over netlink, and another to parse responses from userspace and update the cache. Additionally, it wires up an event notification for cache misses, triggering SUNRPC_CMD_CACHE_NOTIFY multicast events with SUNRPC_CACHE_TYPE_IP_MAP.
